title: City Council Approves New Budget
text: The city council met yesterday to approve the annual budget for public services including roads, schools, and hospitals. The vote passed unanimously with support from all parties.

title: Scientists Discover New Species
text: Marine biologists from the University of California have identified a new species of deep-sea fish during an expedition to the Pacific Ocean. The findings were published in Nature.

title: Local School Wins National Award
text: Lincoln Elementary School has won the National Excellence in Education Award for its innovative STEM program. The principal credited the dedicated teaching staff.
